compLinked: This pour is linked to a
compLinkedHint: . Join the comp (if needed), claim with Google, then save your bar & rating; we'll add this score automatically.
claimSplitBlurb: Sign in with Google to claim this score to your email. If you set a nickname under Profile, that name is used on the feed; otherwise we use your Google name.
msgClaimFailed: Failed to claim this score. Please try again.
msgUnclaimSuccess: Score unclaimed. This pour is anonymous again.
msgUnclaimFailed: Could not unclaim this score. Try again.
noVenueSaved: No venue saved for this pour.
celebrationMidHigh: Beautiful split. Like a true Dubliner.
celebrationMid: Cheers for trying. Have another go.
celebrationLow: The perfect split awaits. Try again.
closeupHint: Zoomed on the logo and foam line
closeupAlt: G logo close-up from your split
annotatedHint: Model boxes and labels on your photo
ratePourBlurb: Search for the venue or type its name, set your rating, and optionally log what you paid for expense tracking.
pintPriceHint: Amount you paid. Use your usual currency; we only store the number.
unclaimDialogDescription: Your email will be removed from this pour and it will show an anonymous name again. You can reclaim it later if you still have this device session.
placesNoApiKey: Venue search needs VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in .env.local (browser key).
placesUnavailable: Google Maps didn’t load. Enable Maps JavaScript API + Places API (New), billing, and add this site to the key’s HTTP referrer allowlist (see browser console).
placesPlaceholder: Search for a bar in Thailand or type the name
geofenceVenueMismatch: Enable location and stand near this pub to save a Google-tagged venue.
shareHookHigh: Think you can split the G cleaner than this pour?
shareHookMid: Your turn: beat my line and show the feed.
shareHookLow: Pour yours on Split the G and try to score higher.
shareTweetLong: {hook} I scored {score}/5 on Split the G. Pour yours: {url}
shareTelegramRest: I scored {score}/5. Open the link to pour yours and get scored.
shareRedditTitle: Split the G: scored {score}/5. Can you beat this pour?
sharePanelBlurb: Challenge line, score, wall ranks, and the link they tap to pour theirs.
shareInstagramHint: Instagram has no web share. Use
